title: astragalus altus
intro: Astragalus altus, a perennial plant species within the legume family, is commonly known as the Mongolian milkvetch. The root of Astragalus altus is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus altus include its potential to reduce fatigue, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Astragalus altus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as capsules, tea, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
